description: A production run is complete, and there is unused raw material at the workstation that needs to be returned to inventory.

nodes.task_description: Identify the part number and quantity of the unused material.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the material and counts the remaining quantity.

nodes.task_description: Generate a 'Return to Stock' transaction in the inventory system.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully creates a transaction to move the inventory from the production line back to the main warehouse.

nodes.task_description: Confirm that the line-side inventory has been cleared and the warehouse inventory has increased.

expected_outcome.value: Agent verifies the inventory levels have been correctly adjusted in both locations.
